_meta.note: Each key has _en and _hi variant. Use djb2(topic+segmentType) % length to pick deterministically.

_en: Amazon's Principal Engineer asked one Kafka question. Three L5 seniors froze.
Most engineers fail the Kafka round at Flipkart. Not because they don't know Kafka — because they answer it wrong.
₹50LPA is the difference between knowing Kafka producers and knowing Kafka producers correctly.
This one Kafka detail gets engineers rejected at Google every single quarter.
I've watched 40 Kafka interviews at Swiggy. Same mistake. Every. Single. Time.
Confluent's engineering blog has a post that invalidates 80% of Kafka tutorials online.
Your Kafka knowledge has a gap. FAANG interviewers know exactly where it is.
The L6 panel at Amazon will ask you this. And your current answer is wrong.
_hi: Amazon ke Principal Engineer ne ek Kafka question pucha. Teen seniors freeze ho gaye.
Flipkart Kafka round mein 80% log fail kyun hote hain? Answer sunoge toh hairan ho jaoge.
Yaar, ₹50LPA ka farak sirf ek Kafka concept pe depend karta hai.
Google har quarter mein engineers ko isi Kafka detail pe reject karta hai.
Maine 40 Kafka interviews dekhe hain Swiggy mein. Ek hi galti. Baar baar.
Confluent ka ek blog post hai jo teri Kafka preparation ko restart karega.
Tere Kafka knowledge mein ek hole hai. FAANG interviewer ko pata hai kahan hai.
L6 panel yahi puchega. Aur tera current answer galat hai.

_en: Redis doesn't persist data. 90% of engineers don't know this until their system crashes.
PhonePe's Redis cluster went down in 2022. Engineers who knew this one fact saved it.
The most common Redis mistake costs you the Zomato SDE-2 offer.
I asked 30 backend engineers what Redis is. Only 4 answered correctly.
Your Redis is leaking memory right now. You just don't know it yet.
FAANG interviewers have a Redis trap question. Almost nobody survives it.
₹40LPA hinges on one Redis eviction policy detail. You probably got it wrong.
Meesho's engineering team rebuilt their entire cache layer. Here's the Redis decision that caused it.
_hi: Redis data persist nahi karta. 90% engineers yeh tab jaante hain jab system crash hota hai.
PhonePe ka Redis cluster 2022 mein down hua. Sirf unhe pata tha jinhone yeh concept padha tha.
Yeh ek Redis mistake Zomato SDE-2 offer cheen leti hai.
Maine 30 backend engineers se Redis ka matlab pucha. Sirf 4 sahi jawab de paaye.
Tera Redis abhi bhi memory leak kar raha hai. Bas tujhe pata nahi.
FAANG mein Redis trap question hai. Zyaadatar log survive nahi karte.
₹40LPA ka farak ek Redis eviction policy se hai. Galat answer diya hoga tune.
Meesho ki team ne poora cache layer rebuild kiya. Redis ka ek decision tha wajah.

_en: System design interviews separate ₹18LPA engineers from ₹80LPA engineers. Permanently.
Amazon SDE-2 panel: 'Design WhatsApp.' Most candidates open with the wrong component.
I've graded 200 system design interviews. The failure pattern is always the same.
The mistake that kills your Flipkart system design round happens in the first 90 seconds.
Google rejects 70% of system design candidates on the same misunderstanding.
Your system design is missing a layer. Every senior engineer can see it. You can't.
Paytm's entire payment infrastructure runs on a principle most SDE-1s have never heard of.
The engineer who clears Uber SDE-3 starts differently. Let me show you how.
_hi: System design interview ₹18LPA aur ₹80LPA engineers mein permanent line kheench deta hai.
Amazon SDE-2 panel: 'Design WhatsApp.' Zyaadatar candidates galat component se shuru karte hain.
Maine 200 system design interviews grade kiye. Failure pattern hamesha same hota hai.
Flipkart system design round first 90 seconds mein hi haart jaate ho.
Google 70% system design candidates ek hi misunderstanding pe reject karta hai.
Tera system design mein ek layer missing hai. Har senior engineer dekh sakta hai. Tu nahi.
Paytm ka pura payment infrastructure ek principle pe chalta hai jo zyaadatar SDE-1s ne suna nahi.
Uber SDE-3 clear karne wala engineer alag se shuru karta hai. Dekho kaise.

_en: Java's garbage collector is lying to you. And it will lie to you in your next interview.
The Java concurrent HashMap question breaks 60% of SDE-2 candidates at Amazon.
Most Java developers have never actually read what 'synchronized' costs at scale.
Every Spring Boot app running in production has this Java thread pool mistake.
Infosys, TCS, Wipro — they all ask the same Java trick question. You're not ready.
₹25LPA Java developer vs ₹55LPA Java developer: one word separates them. Seriously.
Oracle's JVM internals docs have a section that invalidates your Java knowledge.
The thread-safe singleton question ended 200 careers at HCL this year alone.
_hi: Java ka garbage collector tujhse jhooth bol raha hai. Agle interview mein bhi bolega.
Amazon mein Java concurrent HashMap question 60% SDE-2 candidates tod deta hai.
Zyaadatar Java developers ne 'synchronized' ka scale cost kabhi nahi padha.
Har Spring Boot production app mein yeh Java thread pool mistake hai.
Infosys, TCS, Wipro — sabse same Java trick question aata hai. Tu ready nahi hai.
₹25LPA Java developer aur ₹55LPA Java developer: sirf ek word ka farak. Seriously.
Oracle ke JVM internals docs mein ek section hai jo tera Java knowledge invalidate karta hai.
Thread-safe singleton question ne is saal akele HCL mein 200 careers khatam kiye.

_en: Your microservices aren't micro enough. Or they're too micro. Both kill you in interviews.
Swiggy migrated from monolith to microservices twice. The second time was the mistake.
The 'design a microservices system' question has a trap. 90% of candidates step right into it.
Netflix's engineering blog documents the microservices mistake that brought down their API in 2012.
Every senior at Razorpay asks this one microservices question. Nobody passes it correctly.
Splitting a monolith wrong costs more than keeping it. Most engineers don't know this.
The ₹60LPA architect position requires one microservices concept most SDE-2s have never studied.
Bounded context. Two words. The difference between clearing and failing the Flipkart design round.
_hi: Tere microservices micro enough nahi hain. Ya bahut micro hain. Dono interview mein maarte hain.
Swiggy ne monolith se microservices mein do baar migrate kiya. Doosri baar galat tha.
Microservices system design question mein ek trap hai. 90% candidates seedha usme ghuste hain.
Netflix ke engineering blog mein 2012 wali microservices galti documented hai.
Razorpay ke har senior ek microservices question poochte hain. Koi sahi pass nahi karta.
Monolith ko galat split karna usse rakhne se zyaada costly hai. Zyaadatar engineers yeh nahi jaante.
₹60LPA architect position ek microservices concept maangti hai jo zyaadatar SDE-2s ne padha nahi.
Bounded context. Do words. Flipkart design round clear karna aur fail karna ka farak.

_en: Your Docker containers are running as root. In production. Right now.
Amazon ECS rejected this candidate's Docker setup in under 60 seconds. I'll show you why.
The Docker layer cache mistake silently bloats every image you've ever built.
Zomato's SRE team found a Docker misconfiguration that was costing ₹4L/month in infra.
Multi-stage Docker builds exist because of one problem. 80% of devs skip the solution.
Kubernetes won't accept your Dockerfile. I can tell before I read it. Here's why.
The one ENV variable every Docker security guide tells you to set. Check yours right now.
DevOps interview at Phonepe: Docker question round 1. This exact question. Are you ready?
_hi: Tera Docker container root pe chal raha hai. Production mein. Abhi bhi.
Amazon ECS ne ek candidate ka Docker setup 60 seconds mein reject kar diya. Kyu, dikhaata hoon.
Docker layer cache mistake silently har image bloat karti hai jo tune banaya hai.
Zomato ke SRE team ne Docker misconfiguration dhundhi jo ₹4L/month infra cost kar rahi thi.
Multi-stage Docker builds ek problem ke liye exist karta hai. 80% devs solution skip karte hain.
Kubernetes tera Dockerfile accept nahi karega. Padhne se pehle bata sakta hoon. Kyun, sun.
Ek ENV variable hai jo har Docker security guide set karne ko kehti hai. Apna check kar abhi.
Phonepe DevOps interview: round 1 Docker question. Yahi question. Tu ready hai?

_en: Kubernetes just silently killed your pod. Here's what you missed.
The Flipkart SRE failed a Kubernetes probe configuration. Production went down for 18 minutes.
Most engineers configure Kubernetes resource limits wrong. Google's SRE guide says so.
Your Kubernetes cluster is about to OOM-kill the wrong pod. Here's why.
The CKA exam question that 40% of candidates get wrong is this one. I'll show you.
Razorpay's entire payment pod crashed during a Kubernetes upgrade. Same root cause every time.
HorizontalPodAutoscaler. One misconfiguration. ₹2L/month in unnecessary compute costs.
The engineer who cleared Uber's SRE round answered the Kubernetes question like this.
_hi: Kubernetes ne silently tera pod kill kar diya. Yeh tune miss kiya tha.
Flipkart SRE Kubernetes probe configuration mein galti ki. Production 18 minutes down raha.
Zyaadatar engineers Kubernetes resource limits galat configure karte hain. Google SRE guide yahi kehta hai.
Tera Kubernetes cluster galat pod ko OOM-kill karne wala hai. Kyu, sun.
CKA exam question jo 40% candidates galat karte hain — yahi. Dikhaata hoon.
Razorpay ka pura payment pod Kubernetes upgrade ke dauran crash hua. Har baar same root cause.
HorizontalPodAutoscaler. Ek misconfiguration. ₹2L/month extra compute cost.
Uber SRE round clear karne wale engineer ne Kubernetes question aisa answer kiya.

_en: Your SQL query is performing a full table scan. In production. On 500 million rows.
The Swiggy backend interview SQL question has a trap. Here's exactly what it is.
N+1 query problem: the interview question that breaks SDE-2 candidates at Flipkart.
Amazon's senior engineers write SQL that runs 40x faster. One difference.
The EXPLAIN output tells you everything. 90% of developers have never read it.
Index selectivity. Two words. The reason your app slows down as it scales.
Ola's DB team found a query that was adding 80ms latency to every checkout request.
JOIN vs subquery: there's a right answer. Most developers don't know it.
_hi: Tera SQL query full table scan kar raha hai. Production mein. 500 million rows pe.
Swiggy backend interview SQL question mein ek trap hai. Exactly kya hai, bata raha hoon.
N+1 query problem: woh interview question jo Flipkart mein SDE-2 candidates todata hai.
Amazon ke senior engineers aisa SQL likhte hain jo 40x faster chalta hai. Ek farak.
EXPLAIN output sab kuch bata deta hai. 90% developers ne kabhi padha nahi.
Index selectivity. Do words. Reason hai tera app scale hone pe slow kyun hota hai.
Ola ki DB team ne ek query dhundhi jo har checkout request mein 80ms latency add kar rahi thi.
JOIN vs subquery: ek sahi answer hai. Zyaadatar developers jaante nahi.

_en: Your cache is serving stale data right now. You don't know when it started.
Cache stampede killed Myntra's homepage during a sale. Here's the one fix.
The ₹45LPA backend role asks exactly this caching question. And you're not ready.
Amazon's CDN team documented a cache poisoning attack. Most engineers never read it.
TTL. Three letters. The wrong value costs you the SDE-2 Zomato interview.
Cache-aside vs write-through: picking wrong costs ₹20LPA in FAANG interviews.
Swiggy's 2023 incident post reveals a caching pattern 80% of engineers get backward.
Read-through cache has a race condition. Most tutorials don't show you where.
_hi: Tera cache abhi stale data serve kar raha hai. Kab se hua pata nahi.
Cache stampede ne Myntra ka homepage sale ke dauran kill kar diya. Ek fix hai.
₹45LPA backend role mein yahi caching question poochha jaata hai. Aur tu ready nahi hai.
Amazon CDN team ne cache poisoning attack document kiya hai. Zyaadatar engineers ne kabhi padha nahi.
TTL. Teen letters. Wrong value Zomato SDE-2 interview le jaata hai tujhse.
Cache-aside vs write-through: galat choose karna FAANG mein ₹20LPA ka farak dalata hai.
Swiggy ka 2023 incident post ek caching pattern reveal karta hai jo 80% engineers backward samajhte hain.
Read-through cache mein race condition hai. Zyaadatar tutorials nahi dikhate kahan.

_en: CAP theorem: every engineer knows it. Almost none can apply it correctly.
Google's Spanner paper has an insight that breaks 90% of distributed system designs.
The Amazon DynamoDB consistency model question eliminates 60% of SDE-3 candidates.
Two-phase commit is the wrong answer. FAANG interviewers know when you say it.
Meesho's catalog service had a distributed transaction bug. ₹3Cr revenue lost in 2 hours.
The difference between CP and AP system design: one choice, ₹50LPA difference.
Uber's distributed lock manager fails 30% of the time. They built it that way on purpose.
SAGA pattern vs two-phase commit: FAANG wants to know if you know the difference.
_hi: CAP theorem: har engineer jaanta hai. Almost koi correctly apply nahi kar sakta.
Google Spanner paper mein ek insight hai jo 90% distributed system designs tod deta hai.
Amazon DynamoDB consistency model question 60% SDE-3 candidates eliminate karta hai.
Two-phase commit galat answer hai. FAANG interviewers jaante hain jab tu bolega.
Meesho ke catalog service mein distributed transaction bug tha. ₹3Cr revenue 2 ghante mein gaya.
CP vs AP system design: ek choice, ₹50LPA ka farak.
Uber ka distributed lock manager 30% time fail karta hai. Unhone purposely banaya hai aisa.
SAGA pattern vs two-phase commit: FAANG jaanna chahta hai kya tujhe farak pata hai.

_en: Your Java code has a race condition. Right now. In production.
Amazon's concurrent programming question kills 70% of SDE-2 candidates instantly.
Thread pool sizing: wrong answer costs you the Flipkart backend offer.
The Java memory model question that no tutorial explains correctly.
Deadlock vs livelock: 90% of engineers confuse them in interviews. Don't be that engineer.
Volatile keyword in Java: 60% of developers are using it wrong.
The ForkJoin framework question at PhonePe SDE-3 — most people have never even opened it.
CompletableFuture has a pitfall that silently swallows exceptions. You're probably hitting it.
_hi: Tera Java code mein race condition hai. Abhi bhi. Production mein.
Amazon concurrent programming question instantly 70% SDE-2 candidates ko kill karta hai.
Thread pool sizing: galat answer Flipkart backend offer le jaata hai.
Java memory model question jo koi tutorial sahi explain nahi karta.
Deadlock vs livelock: 90% engineers interviews mein confuse ho jaate hain. Tu mat ho.
Java mein volatile keyword: 60% developers galat use kar rahe hain.
PhonePe SDE-3 pe ForkJoin framework question — zyaadatar log kabhi khole bhi nahi hain.
CompletableFuture mein ek pitfall hai jo silently exceptions swallow karta hai. Tune hit kiya hoga.

_en: Round-robin load balancing is wrong for 60% of use cases. And it's what you'd say.
Zomato's load balancer misconfiguration caused a 45-minute outage during IPL 2023.
Consistent hashing: the ₹50LPA system design detail most SDE-2s miss entirely.
Layer 4 vs Layer 7 load balancing: wrong choice fails the Amazon architecture round.
Sticky sessions are a trap. FAANG interviewers use them to find weak candidates.
The health check configuration that caused Flipkart Big Billion Days slowdown in 2022.
Least connections algorithm vs least response time: pick wrong, fail the SRE interview.
Your load balancer is a single point of failure. Every interviewer will find this.
_hi: Round-robin load balancing 60% use cases ke liye galat hai. Aur yahi tu bolega.
Zomato ke load balancer misconfiguration ne IPL 2023 mein 45-minute outage kiya.
Consistent hashing: ₹50LPA system design detail jo zyaadatar SDE-2s miss karte hain.
Layer 4 vs Layer 7 load balancing: galat choice Amazon architecture round fail karaata hai.
Sticky sessions ek trap hain. FAANG interviewers inse weak candidates dhundhte hain.
Health check configuration jo Flipkart Big Billion Days 2022 slowdown ka reason thi.
Least connections vs least response time: galat choose karna SRE interview fail karaata hai.
Tera load balancer single point of failure hai. Har interviewer dhundhega yeh.

_en: You can solve LeetCode Hard. You still can't clear Amazon's SDE-2 round. Here's why.
Striver's A2Z sheet has 450 problems. FAANG only asks patterns from 12 categories.
The two-pointer technique question that eliminates 70% of Flipkart candidates.
Dynamic programming: the greedy mistake that looks right and costs you the offer.
Binary search on the answer space: the pattern most engineers have never heard of.
Google asks graph questions that LeetCode doesn't prepare you for. I'll show you.
Segment tree vs BIT: wrong choice tells the interviewer you don't understand the problem.
The sliding window question every Zomato SDE interview includes. Can you solve it?
_hi: Tu LeetCode Hard solve kar sakta hai. Phir bhi Amazon SDE-2 round clear nahi hota. Kyu.
Striver ki A2Z sheet mein 450 problems hain. FAANG sirf 12 categories ke patterns poochta hai.
Two-pointer technique question jo 70% Flipkart candidates eliminate karta hai.
Dynamic programming: greedy galti jo sahi lagti hai aur offer le jaati hai.
Binary search on answer space: pattern jo zyaadatar engineers ne suna nahi.
Google aise graph questions poochta hai jo LeetCode prepare nahi karata. Dikhaata hoon.
Segment tree vs BIT: galat choice interviewer ko bata deta hai tu problem samjha nahi.
Sliding window question jo har Zomato SDE interview mein hota hai. Solve kar payega?

_en: Here's what's at stake: your next offer letter.
Get this wrong and the interviewer circles your resume in red.
At Amazon's L5 bar, this is table stakes. Not knowing it is an automatic reject.
The panel writes 'strong no hire' in under 5 minutes when they hear the wrong answer here.
You've been practicing LeetCode for 6 months. This is the question that makes it all irrelevant.
Your competition — the IIT-B grad who's been grinding system design — knows this. Do you?
One answer separates SDE-2 at ₹25LPA from SDE-3 at ₹55LPA. This is that answer.
If you're in a FAANG loop right now, stop. This changes your answer to question 2.
The recruiter told you 'we'll let you know.' Here's the real reason they said that.
Five minutes from now you'll know something that 80% of engineers in your cohort don't.
Most people watching this have the wrong mental model. I'm going to break it.
At Flipkart's current hiring bar, this isn't advanced — it's baseline. Are you at baseline?
You cannot fake your way through this question. The interviewer has heard every fake answer.
Your TC is stuck. Here's the exact knowledge gap holding it there.
_hi: Yahan kya daav pe hai: tera agle offer letter.
Yeh galat answer diya toh interviewer tera resume red circle karta hai.
Amazon L5 bar pe yeh table stakes hai. Nahi pata toh automatic reject.
Panel 5 minutes mein 'strong no hire' likh deta hai jab yeh galat answer sunata hai.
6 mahine LeetCode practice ki. Yeh woh question hai jo sab irrelevant bana deta hai.
Teri competition — IIT-B wala jo system design grind kar raha hai — yeh jaanta hai. Tu?
Ek answer ₹25LPA SDE-2 aur ₹55LPA SDE-3 mein farak karta hai. Yahi woh answer hai.
Abhi FAANG loop mein hai toh ruk ja. Yeh tera question 2 ka answer badal deta hai.
Recruiter ne bola 'batayenge'. Yeh hai asli reason.
Paanch minute mein tujhe kuch aisa pata chalega jo 80% engineers tere cohort mein nahi jaante.
Zyaadatar log galat mental model le kar chal rahe hain. Todne wala hoon.
Flipkart ki current hiring bar pe yeh advanced nahi — baseline hai. Tu baseline pe hai?
Ise fake karke nahi diya jata. Interviewer ne har fake answer sun rakha hai.
Tera TC ek jagah stuck hai. Yeh hai exact knowledge gap jo wahan rokh raha hai.

_en: Go to guru-sishya.in right now. 80 questions exactly like this one, fully solved.

If you're preparing for SDE-2 or above, guru-sishya.in has the complete system design bank. Free.
guru-sishya.in has the 80-question bank that TakeUForward built for DSA. We built it for system design.
